item.title: Reacting To Dr. Now
item.description: Breaking down Dr. Now’s funniest, bluntest, and absolutely savage one-liners. The man doesn’t sugarcoat anything and honestly… that’s why we love him.

media:content.media:title: Reacting To Dr. Now
media:content.media:description: Breaking down Dr. Now’s funniest, bluntest, and absolutely savage one-liners. The man doesn’t sugarcoat anything and honestly… that’s why we love him.

item.title: How the Carnivore Diet Transformed My Life!
item.description: I found out that people were dropping hundreds upon hundreds of lbs and healing a bunch of autoimmune diseases and stuff by eating only meat, so I gave it a try.

media:content.media:title: How the Carnivore Diet Transformed My Life!
media:content.media:description: I found out that people were dropping hundreds upon hundreds of lbs and healing a bunch of autoimmune diseases and stuff by eating only meat, so I gave it a try.

item.title: Michael Bublé's Movie Is Ridiculous
item.description: A lighthearted critique of Michael Bublé’s romance film and why it leans more awkward than charming for modern audiences.

media:content.media:title: Michael Bublé's Movie Is Ridiculous
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted critique of Michael Bublé’s romance film and why it leans more awkward than charming for modern audiences.
